intended_use_full: Ezra Plexo Software is a medical diagnostic application for viewing, manipulation, 3D-visualization, and comparison of MR medical images. Ezra Plexo Software is designed to support the oncological workflow by helping the user confirm the absence or presence of lesions, including evaluation, quantification, and documentation of any such lesions.
ground_truth: Consensus ground truth created by five U.S. board certified expert radiologists
